ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "nb_cores" INTEGER /* Number of CPU cores used for the experiment */,
  "environment" INTEGER /* ID of the environment or framework used for the experiment */,
  "penalty" INTEGER /* ID of the penalty used in the optimization */,
  "lambda" REAL /* Value of the lambda parameter */,
  "duality_gap_interval" INTEGER /* Interval for the duality gap */,
  "nb_threads" INTEGER /* Number of threads used for the experiment */,
  "solver" INTEGER /* ID of the solver used for the optimization */,
  "tolerance" INTEGER /* Tolerance level for the solver */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for the experiment */,
  "primal_objective" REAL /* Primal objective value achieved */,
  "best_dual" REAL /* Best dual objective value achieved */,
  "relative_duality_gap" REAL /* Relative duality gap */,
  "diff" INTEGER /* Difference between primal and dual objectives */,
  "relative_optimality_gap" REAL /* Relative optimality gap */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the experiment was conducted */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number of the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the experiment */,
  "experiment_status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "experiment_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the experiment */,
  "experiment_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of the experiment */,
  "experiment_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the experiment */,
  "experiment_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the experiment */,
  "experiment_tag" TEXT /* Tag for easier categorization and filtering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_solver FOREIGN KEY ("solver") REFERENCES solvers ("solver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_nb_cores FOREIGN KEY ("nb_cores") REFERENCES CPUs ("cpu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_nb_threads FOREIGN KEY ("nb_threads") REFERENCES threads ("thread_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_environment FOREIGN KEY ("environment") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_tolerance FOREIGN KEY ("tolerance") REFERENCES tolerances ("tolerance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_penalty FOREIGN KEY ("penalty") REFERENCES penalties ("penalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "readme_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last date the dataset was modified */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the dataset is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment or framework */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the environment or framework */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment or framework */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system used */,
  "hardware_specifications" TEXT /* Hardware specifications used */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the environment was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "penalties" (
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each penalty */,
  "penalty_name" TEXT /* Name of the penalty */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the penalty */,
  "default_value" REAL /* Default value for the penalty */,
  "range" TEXT /* Range of valid values for the penalty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("penalty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solvers" (
  "solver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solver */,
  "solver_name" TEXT /* Name of the solver */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the solver */,
  "default_tolerance" REAL /* Default tolerance value for the solver */,
  "max_iterations" INTEGER /* Maximum number of iterations the solver can perform */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the solver was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("solver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "CPUs" (
  "cpu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CPU */,
  "cpu_name" TEXT /* Name of the CPU */,
  "nb_cores" INTEGER /* Number of cores in the CPU */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the CPU */,
  "clock_speed" REAL /* Clock speed of the CPU */,
  "cache_size" INTEGER /* Cache size of the CPU */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* CPU architecture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cpu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "threads" (
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thread configuration */,
  "nb_threads" INTEGER /* Number of threads used for the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the thread configuration */,
  "affinity" TEXT /* CPU affinity settings for the threads */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the thread configuration was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thread_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tolerances" (
  "tolerance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tolerance */,
  "tolerance_value" REAL /* Value of the tolerance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tolerance */,
  "default_value" REAL /* Default value for the tolerance */,
  "range" TEXT /* Range of valid values for the tolerance */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the tolerance was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tolerance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* User's affiliation (e.g., university, company) */,
  "profile_picture_path" TEXT /* Path to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's device */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "primal_objective" REAL /* Primal objective value achieved */,
  "best_dual" REAL /* Best dual objective value achieved */,
  "relative_duality_gap" REAL /* Relative duality gap */,
  "diff" INTEGER /* Difference between primal and dual objectives */,
  "relative_optimality_gap" REAL /* Relative optimality gap */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the result was recorded */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "loss" REAL /* Loss value of the model */,
  "execution_time" INTEGER /* Time taken for the experiment to complete in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment progress record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number of the experiment */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the progress was recorded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "current_epoch" INTEGER /* Current epoch number */,
  "total_epochs" INTEGER /* Total number of epochs */,
  "progress_percentage" REAL /* Progress percentage of the experiment */,
  "estimated_completion_time" TEXT /* Estimated completion time of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_progress_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment configuration */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "hyperparameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hyperparameter */,
  "config_type" TEXT /* Type of configuration (e.g., hyperparameter, environment setting) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the configuration (e.g., training, testing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_configs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
